sourcesContent:
export const courses = [
  {
    id: 'ui-ux',
    title: 'UI/UX Design',
    description: 'Master user interface and experience design principles',
    category: 'Design',
    duration: '8 weeks',
    level: 'Beginner to Advanced',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1561070791-2526d30994b5?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80',
    youtubeLinks: [
      'https://www.youtube.com/embed/Xd7huBu39qk',
      'https://www.youtube.com/embed/c9Wg6Cb_YlU'
    ],
    enrolled: true
  },
  {
    id: 'web-dev',
    title: 'Web Development',
    description: 'Learn HTML, CSS, JavaScript and build modern websites',
    category: 'Development',
    duration: '12 weeks',
    level: 'Beginner',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1499951360447-b19be8fe80f5?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80',
    youtubeLinks: [
      'https://www.youtube.com/embed/qz0aGYrrlhU',
      'https://www.youtube.com/embed/PkZNo7MFNFg'
    ],
    enrolled: true
  },
  {
    id: 'full-stack',
    title: 'Full Stack Development',
    description: 'Master both frontend and backend development',
    category: 'Development',
    duration: '24 weeks',
    level: 'Intermediate',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1555066931-4365d14bab8c?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80',
    youtubeLinks: [
      'https://www.youtube.com/embed/7CqJlxBYj-M',
      'https://www.youtube.com/embed/fis26HvvDII'
    ],
    enrolled: false
  },
  {
    id: 'mern-stack',
    title: 'MERN Stack',
    description: 'MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js complete guide',
    category: 'Development',
    duration: '16 weeks',
    level: 'Intermediate',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1627398242454-45a1465c2479?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80',
    youtubeLinks: [
      'https://www.youtube.com/embed/98BzS5Oz5E4',
      'https://www.youtube.com/embed/CvCiNeLnZ00'
    ],
    enrolled: false
  },
  {
    id: 'ai-ml',
    title: 'AI/ML Fundamentals',
    description: 'Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning basics',
    category: 'Data Science',
    duration: '20 weeks',
    level: 'Advanced',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1485827404703-89b55fcc595e?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80',
    youtubeLinks: [
      'https://www.youtube.com/embed/JB8T1NgePmQ',
      'https://www.youtube.com/embed/KNAWp2S3w94'
    ],
    enrolled: false
  },
  {
    id: 'cloud',
    title: 'Cloud Computing',
    description: 'AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud platform mastery',
    category: 'DevOps',
    duration: '14 weeks',
    level: 'Intermediate',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1451187580459-43490279c0fa?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80',
    youtubeLinks: [
      'https://www.youtube.com/embed/3hLmDS179YE',
      'https://www.youtube.com/embed/slryQpiZ0e0'
    ],
    enrolled: false
  },
  {
    id: 'low-code',
    title: 'Low Code Development',
    description: 'Build applications with minimal coding',
    category: 'Development',
    duration: '6 weeks',
    level: 'Beginner',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1611224923853-80b023f02d71?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80',
    youtubeLinks: [
      'https://www.youtube.com/embed/example1',
      'https://www.youtube.com/embed/example2'
    ],
    enrolled: false
  },
  {
    id: 'no-code',
    title: 'No Code Development',
    description: 'Create applications without writing code',
    category: 'Development',
    duration: '4 weeks',
    level: 'Beginner',
    image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1558494949-ef010cbdcc31?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=800&q=80',
    youtubeLinks: [
      'https://www.youtube.com/embed/example3',
      'https://www.youtube.com/embed/example4'
    ],
    enrolled: false
  }
];

export const categories = [
  'All',
  'Design',
  'Development',
  'Data Science',
  'DevOps',
  'Business'
];
